findings.detail: Read docs/catalog/heartbeats/2026-05-17T11-09-14Z-atlas.json — gi=0.64 mode=yellow source=kv; 12 elevated anomaly labels; seed_result=200 OK; sustain_eligible=false; core kv_keys present (LEDGER_CIRCUIT_OPEN false).

GET https://mobius-civic-ai-terminal.vercel.app/api/signals/micro 200 — gi=0.628 instrumentCount=40; 11 instruments source=error plus npm and Terminal self-ping at 0.3 stress. Micro payload cycle C-306 vs integrity/quorum C-314 (metadata drift).

GET /api/integrity-status 200 — source kv (not mock); global_integrity 0.746 mode yellow degraded true terminal_status stressed; gi_verified false. Headline GI differs from ATLAS catalog gi 0.64 and from micro composite 0.628 — reconcile before treating any single scalar as authoritative.
GET /api/epicon/candidates 200 — count 0; no candidates, verification skipped (no POST /api/zeus/verify or /api/epicon/publish).
GET /api/quorum/state 200 — state_machine.quorum_state substrate_pending; integrity.source kv-live; supplemental read for operator context.
POST /api/vault/attest returned HTTP 404 (HTML not-found); quorum_status not returned — route not present on deployed surface.
POST /api/agents/journal returned HTTP 502 with github_403 — substrate canon write blocked; mirrored_to_kv false.

recommendation: Treat external instrument failures as persistent until upstream recovery; NASA EONET recovered versus the prior ATLAS snapshot. Reconcile ATLAS catalog gi, KV integrity-status, and live micro composite; fix micro sweep cycle field drift (C-306 vs C-314). Deploy or alias POST /api/vault/attest for C-298 quorum registration. Restore GitHub credentials/permissions for agent journal substrate writes.
